description: A visualization studio needs to convert a Cycles car scene to EEVEE for an interactive client presentation. The BMW demo scene (/home/ga/BlenderProjects/bmw_cycles.blend) is currently set up for Cycles rendering, which is far too slow for real-time use. Convert the scene to the EEVEE render engine with 64 render samples and 32 viewport samples. Enable Ambient Occlusion (GTAO) with a distance of 1.0 m and enable Ray Tracing or Screen Space Reflections. Set the render resolution to 1920x1080 at 100% scale. Render the scene to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/eevee_render.png and save the project file to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/eevee_scene.blend.
